data.acceptance:
- `claude-opus-4-8` is accepted as a valid model identifier in Foolery's settings/config layer without errors.
- The model appears in any UI that lists available Claude models (e.g. model selectors, agent configuration screens).
- Agent dispatch routes correctly when `claude-opus-4-8` is configured as the target model.
- No existing model options (Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5, prior Opus versions) are broken or removed.
- Lint, type-check, and tests pass (`bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`).
